items.summary: This custom Wi-Fi router works off-grid with Starlink and can control my solar power station. Here's how I went about it.

items.summary: Firefox is alive and well - and offering a fast, customizable, bloat-free, private, secure browsing experience from developers who actually listen to their users.

items.title: The Netherlands just blocked a US company from buying the cloud provider that runs Dutch digital identity
items.summary: The Dutch government has imposed a “complete prohibition” on the acquisition of Solvinity, a Dutch cloud provider, by Kyndryl, the American IT infrastructure company spun out of IBM in 2021. items.title: Dropbox founder Drew Houston steps down as CEO after 19 years as the company he built gets squeezed by Google and Apple
items.summary: Drew Houston, the co-founder who built Dropbox from a Y Combinator demo into a company with more than 700 million registered users, is stepping down as chief executive. items.title: Stiglo upozorenje: Svaki router može biti uređaj za nadzor

items.title: American Airlines is getting Starlink Wi-Fi
items.summary: American Airlines is planning to install SpaceX's Starlink Wi-Fi in hundreds of its airplanes, the airline announced today. items.title: I quit ChatGPT for a free, private, and local AI called Ollama - here's why
items.summary: Save your money, your privacy, and the planet. This installable AI offers several benefits you won't find with more traditional models like ChatGPT.

items.title: This startup is betting India’s gig economy can train the world’s robots
items.summary: Human Archive, a startup founded by UC Berkeley and Stanford researchers, is paying gig workers in India to wear camera-equipped caps and sensor devices to collect the real-world physical training data that AI and robotics labs are racing to acquire.

items.title: Memory V re-creates the Memorymoog without the massive headaches or price tag
items.summary: The Memorymoog is legendary for being an absolutely massive-sounding synth and being incredibly unreliable. items.title: Brussels plans to ringfence two-thirds of EU mobile-satellite spectrum for European firms
items.summary: The proposal expected to be announced on Wednesday would leave Starlink and Amazon’s Kuiper able to bid only for the remaining third of the bloc’s 2 GHz mobile-satellite band. items.title: Stord raises $250 million to give independent brands the shipping speed they need to compete with Amazon
items.summary: Stord, a logistics technology company that helps retailers manage inventory, checkout, and fulfillment, has raised $250 million in a Series F round that values the company at $3 billion.
